April 15, 2026

The Best Stucco Finishes for Austin Homes in 2026

Austin homeowners know that choosing the right stucco finish is about more than just aesthetics. With our intense Texas heat, occasional storms, and the unique architectural character of neighborhoods like Westlake Hills and Barton Hills, your stucco finish needs to perform as well as it looks.

Popular Stucco Finishes for Austin Properties

Smooth Finish A smooth stucco finish is perfect for modern homes in areas like The Domain and Mueller. This clean, contemporary look pairs beautifully with the architectural style popular in newer Austin developments. It requires skilled application but delivers a sleek result.

Santa Barbara Finish Named after the California coastal style, this finish has become incredibly popular in Austin's Tarrytown and Travis Heights neighborhoods. Its slightly textured surface hides minor imperfections while providing excellent weather resistance against our hot summers.

Dash Finish For homeowners in Round Rock and Cedar Park looking for maximum durability, the dash finish offers superior weather protection. The textured surface is excellent at hiding repairs and stands up well to the Austin area's occasional hailstorms.

Climate Considerations for Austin

Austin's climate presents unique challenges for stucco. With average summer temperatures exceeding 95 degrees and UV exposure that ranks among the highest in the state, your stucco finish needs to resist cracking, fading, and moisture intrusion. We recommend lighter colors that reflect heat and finishes with adequate texture to manage thermal expansion.

Get Expert Advice
